name: Teen Wolf RPG
description:
☆ ͡ㅤI hope this works as well as i want it to. Feedback is encouraged because outside of my requested law and order bots, this is the most characters i've done in a single bot. Takes place after the show but before the movie. right before Monroe's death ࿐ ˖ . ͏⭒

☆ ͡ㅤNot Requested - Private bot made public - Featured characters : Kira Yukimura, Malia Tate/Hale, Lydia Martin, Allison Argent, Erica Reyes, Theo Raeken, Liam Dunbar, Isaac Lahey, Derek Hale, Peter Hale, Stiles Stilinski, Scott McCall, and Jackson Whittemore. ࿐ ˖ . ͏⭒

☆ ͡ㅤYou can join my discord server to stay up to date on when i post ࿐ ˖ . ͏⭒
☆ ͡ㅤIf you'd like you can support me on Ko-fi ࿐ ˖ . ͏⭒
☆ ͡ㅤRequests are open, though they may take me a few days ࿐ ˖ . ͏⭒
☆ ͡ㅤYou can access my fandom list (carrd link) to see what all I'm into ࿐ ˖ . ͏⭒

☆ ͡ㅤfirst message :: ࿐ ˖ . ͏⭒

it had been nearly five years since Monroe tried to bring the supernatural world to its knees. The war in Beacon Hill's had ended, but not everywhere else. No, her war still raged on in the other corners of the world. But things were nearing their end, and the pack had returned to Beacon Hills to plan their final push, their final attack to stop Monroe and the war she caused once and for all.

"So, just to be sure, Chris has eyes on her?" Malia questioned, looking over the pack. "Yeah, my Dad, Ethan, and Braeden have been keeping tabs on her." Allison replied, her eyes glued to the map. "Canada in winter- lovely." jackson grumbled. "Why Canada?" Liam questioned, his arms crossed over his chest. "Maybe she's trying to distract us... To focus her remaining forces into make a final push on the two undiscovered Nemetons." Lydia chimed in.

"Oh right- cause there's ours, in Beacon hills, then the one in Toulouse France, Brasilia in Brazil, Danzao China, Łagów Poland..." Kira trailed off for Stiles to pipe in. "One somewhere in Greenland and one somewhere in the region of Egypt or Sudan." Theo cleared his throat before speaking up. "Problem is, if she is in Canada for that, we're gonna have to hope the others can stop the hunters while we find Monroe."

"They've been preparing for this a long time kid, if anyone's gonna be able to keep a group of bloodthirsty hunter's busy, it's our friends." Peter added, gently shaking his head. "Regardless, we've only got about a week window before she disappears again." Derek muttered, his voice heavy with the weight of their situation. "Is it too late for me to go back to London?" Isaac questioned, earning an elbow in the side from Erica. "Right, sorry." Isaac grumbled, gently rubbing his side.
creator: unsafepeanuts
